environment.outcome: ABORTED at pre-flight — NOT armed, NOT run

commands: prod: docker exec guvfx-wayond-listener python -c 'import execution.auto_router / signal_intake.signals / intelligence.canonical' (blocker check)
expected_results: Pre-flight verifies the system is ready to arm and autonomously run one Wayond signal end-to-end (acquire -> parse -> route -> demo order -> manage -> close -> outcome -> candidate -> canonical -> real Telegram).
actual_results: Pre-flight (13 surface checks) PASS: listener Up 43h healthy; provider wayond exists + ONBOARDING; unique AUTO_DEMO assignment #7 on demo acct#1; parser cert MEDIUM; transport selectable (telegram-real) + dispatch OFF; auto_execution_enabled False; mode SHADOW; demo acct#1 is_demo+node=1+mt5_instance=1; workers Up; bridge :8788 reachable (/health 401 = alive, auth-gated); monitor cron installed + smoke enabled=False.

BLOCKER (extended pre-flight): the guvfx-wayond-listener image is 2026-07-05 (pre-auto-execution). Inside the listener container: `import execution.auto_router` -> ModuleNotFoundError; `signal_intake.signals` -> ModuleNotFoundError (no signal_acquired); `intelligence.canonical` -> ModuleNotFoundError; promote_plan_to_demo_jobs absent.

IMPACT: the signal_acquired -> auto_router -> plan_demo_execution -> promote_plan_to_demo_jobs chain runs IN the listener process. With this stale image a real Wayond signal would create only a PendingSignalApproval and stop — no autonomous PLACE_ORDER, no trade, no notification. The backend (current code) does not poll approvals, so nothing downstream would fire.
DECISION: ABORTED before the arming sequence (per PRE-FLIGHT 'abort immediately if any fail' + FAILURE POLICY). No flag was flipped.

POST-STATE (reconfirmed read-only): auto_execution_enabled=False, signal_execution_mode=SHADOW, provider wayond=ONBOARDING, NOTIFICATION_DISPATCH_ENABLED absent. Nothing armed; no order; no Telegram sent; ExecutionJob total unchanged (50).
limitations: The demonstration did NOT run: aborted at pre-flight because the Wayond listener image predates the auto-execution/E3/canonical/real-transport code, so the acquisition->routing hop cannot fire an autonomous demo order.
Nothing was armed or changed: provider ONBOARDING, auto_execution_enabled False, mode SHADOW, dispatch OFF — all unchanged. No order, no trade, no Telegram send. E3 remains RED.

FIX REQUIRED (separate packet): redeploy the guvfx-wayond-listener image from current main src (which contains signal_intake.signals.signal_acquired + execution.auto_router with the AUTO_DEMO tier + execution.signal_promotion.promote_plan_to_demo_jobs + intelligence.canonical + renderers). The listener holds the live Telethon session (temp personal account), so the rebuild must preserve/re-auth the session carefully (session de-auth risk).

Only the LISTENER is stale — the trade-ingest worker, shadow worker, and backend are on current code (342d198f9008); the monitor cron + real transport are wired and disabled-by-default. Once the listener is current, the pre-flight can be re-run and the arm-and-run retried.
